target_test: Search is a first-class agent skill
rationale: GapDetection measures 'search'/'search-code'/'search-files' as domains with dedicated remedies, but capabilities:[search] falls through to AgentSkill.Custom, so routing can't match what meta-cognition measures. Add a Search union case + parse arm.

target_test: Routing is a first-class agent skill
rationale: GapDetection tags 'route' -> 'routing' and AgentOrchestrator routes by capability, but capabilities:[routing] parses to AgentSkill.Custom. Add a Routing union case + parse arm.

target_test: Refactoring is a first-class agent skill
rationale: GapDetection tags 'refactor' -> 'refactoring', a measured coding sub-domain, but capabilities:[refactoring] parses to AgentSkill.Custom. Add a Refactoring union case + parse arm.

target_test: Debugging is a first-class agent skill
rationale: GapDetection tags 'debug' -> 'debugging', a measured coding sub-domain, but capabilities:[debugging] parses to AgentSkill.Custom. Add a Debugging union case + parse arm.

target_test: Testing is a first-class agent skill
rationale: GapDetection tags 'test' -> 'testing', a measured coding sub-domain, but capabilities:[testing] parses to AgentSkill.Custom. Add a Testing union case + parse arm.
